calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-26-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters. The will dated March 28, 2025, was admitted to probate.

Bruce W. Lichorowic was appointed as Executor, with full IAEA authority. Bond was set at $20,000.

Amy Harrington was appointed probate referee.

The Court set a status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration for August 9, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed at least two weeks prior to the status date, no appearance is required.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Continued To Jan-26-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
